violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and placed out of order, service call was placed. Establishment to send photos of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Person holding state license is no longer with this location. PIC shall register as a Food Safety Manager with the State of RI. Application was provided at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
Tray and bucket were observed in hand washing sink. Step stool was observed blocking hand sink. Items were moved and stool was relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
